concerns.text: FR-001 (global batch ≥100) and SC-001 (success rate) lack a dedicated implementation task. T018a is marked [ ] (incomplete) and explicitly fails to verify the ≥100 threshold. Without a completed task to aggregate and validate the global batch count, the spec requirement cannot be satisfied.

FR-008 (sensitivity analysis on clustering thresholds) and SC-005 (≥5 cutoffs) are not covered by a completed task. T035 is marked [ ] (incomplete) and fails to generate the required `sensitivity_sweep.json`. T029a/T029 (schema/serialization) are also incomplete, blocking SC-002 verification.

SC-003 (Statistical power analysis) is unaddressed. T044 is marked [ ] (incomplete) and fails to generate the `power_analysis_report.json` required to validate the design target of r ≥ 0.3. No other task covers the calculation of achieved power.

FR-010 (runtime constraint ≤60m) and SC-002 (runtime measurement) lack a completed validation task. T045 is marked [ ] (incomplete) and fails to verify the runtime constraint or the sensitivity sweep data. T029 (serialization) is also incomplete, preventing runtime data capture.

T016a is marked [P] (parallel) but the description notes a hard dependency on T014 and T018. While not a missing task, the parallel flag is misleading given the explicit dependency note, potentially causing execution race conditions if interpreted strictly.
